---
title: "soundscapes-data-modeling"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Testing the SVM

```{r}
all_data$TYPE <- factor(
  all_data$TYPE,
  levels = c("Barren", "Macro_Forest")
)

```

```{r}
library(e1071)
library(dplyr)

run_site_svm_robust <- function(data,
                               predictors = c("ACI","NDSI","AEI","ADI"),
                               type_col = "TYPE",
                               site_col = "site",
                               kernel = "radial",
                               cost = 1,
                               gamma = 0.25) {
  
  data[[type_col]] <- factor(data[[type_col]])
  data <- data[complete.cases(data[, predictors]), ]
  
  row_results <- lapply(unique(data[[site_col]]), function(s) {
    
    train <- data %>% filter(.data[[site_col]] != s)
    test  <- data %>% filter(.data[[site_col]] == s)
    
    model <- svm(
      as.formula(paste(type_col, "~", paste(predictors, collapse = "+"))),
      data = train,
      kernel = kernel,
      cost = cost,
      gamma = gamma,
      probability = TRUE,
      scale = TRUE
    )
    
    pred <- predict(model, newdata = test, probability = TRUE)
    probs <- as.data.frame(attr(pred, "probabilities"))
    
    all_levels <- levels(train[[type_col]])
    missing_levels <- setdiff(all_levels, colnames(probs))
    for (lv in missing_levels) probs[[lv]] <- 0
    
    probs <- probs[, all_levels, drop = FALSE]
    colnames(probs) <- paste0("prob_", colnames(probs))
    
    bind_cols(
      test,
      tibble(pred_class = as.character(pred)),
      probs
    )
  })
  
  row_results <- bind_rows(row_results)
  
  # ---- FIXED SITE-LEVEL SUMMARY ----
  site_results <- row_results %>%
    group_by(.data[[site_col]]) %>%
    summarise(
      across(starts_with("prob_"), mean),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      pred_class = sub(
        "^prob_",
        "",
        names(cur_data())[which.max(c_across(starts_with("prob_")))]
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  list(
    row_results  = row_results,
    site_results = site_results
  )
}

results <- run_site_svm_robust(all_data)

```
